ddls:
CREATE TABLE "happiness_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each happiness score entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the countries table */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the regions table */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the years table */,
  "happiness_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of happiness score */,
  "happiness_score" REAL /* Happiness score */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the happiness score */,
  "economy_gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita */,
  "family" REAL /* Social support score (family) */,
  "health_life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth */,
  "freedom" REAL /* Freedom to make life choices */,
  "trust_government_corruption" REAL /* Perception of corruption in government */,
  "generosity" REAL /* Generosity score */,
  "dystopia_residual" REAL /* Residual score from dystopia */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country for the given year */,
  "gini_coefficient" REAL /* Gini coefficient (measure of income inequality) */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  "internet_usage_rate" REAL /* Internet usage rate */,
  "education_level" REAL /* Average years of schooling */,
  "healthcare_spending_per_capita" REAL /* Healthcare spending per capita */,
  "environmental_quality" REAL /* Environmental quality score */,
  "political_stability" REAL /* Political stability score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_scores_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_scores_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the regions table */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "head_of_state" TEXT /* Name of the current head of state */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of the data entry */,
  "is_current_year" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the year is the current year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "climate" TEXT /* General climate type of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "minimum_value" REAL /* Minimum possible value for the metric */,
  "maximum_value" REAL /* Maximum possible value for the metric */,
  "average_value" REAL /* Global average value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES happiness_scores ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., basic, advanced, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_logout" TEXT /* Date and time of the last logout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "data_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the data included in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, trend analysis) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Description of the methodology used in the report */,
  "key_findings" TEXT /* Summary of key findings from the report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for improving happiness based on the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score related to the prediction */,
  "predicted_happiness_score" REAL /* Predicted happiness score */,
  "prediction_year" INTEGER /* Year for which the prediction is made */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model used for prediction */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the predicted score */,
  "external_factors" TEXT /* External factors considered in the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES happiness_scores ("score_id")
)
